tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Module verification, formatting, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible cross-architecture builds, kernel, MCP and worker smoke tests, Python tests, and repository validation passed.

tests.name: official PostgreSQL 18.3 main CI
tests.summary: The exact public implementation commit passed repository validation and the complete PostgreSQL durability suite.

tests.name: worker process and contract suite
tests.summary: The suite covers process-tree cancellation, residual children, timeouts, output bounds, invalid UTF-8, environment filtering, report schemas, exact changed paths, scope escapes, evidence hashes, ignored mutations, blocked work, contamination quarantine, usage budgets, and one-shot CLI behavior.

tests.name: fenced attempt lifecycle and restart recovery
coverage: monotonic attempt ordinals and replay-safe creation
safe result persistence without raw stdout or stderr
abandoned queued and running attempt reconciliation
stale owner rejection and concurrent lease replacement

tests.name: scope and failure-state hardening
coverage: pre-created non-symlink write and evidence directories
Git worktree identity and hidden index-flag rejection
exact equality between reported and observed changed paths
terminal quarantine after failed or unverifiable mutation
validated blocked changes retained for human inspection
no retry on a contaminated worktree
